title: Back Office Operations & Systems Specialist with German language skills

summary.lv: Circle K Business Centre meklē back-office operāciju un sistēmu speciālistu ar vācu valodas zināšanām, kas atbalstīs Vācijas degvielas termināļu operatīvos un sistēmu procesus.
summary.en: Circle K Business Centre is hiring a Back Office Operations & Systems Specialist with German to support operational and system processes for fuel terminals in Germany.
